δ : Type u_4

inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace δ

inst✝ : IsFiniteMeasure μ
X : α → β
Y : α → γ
Z : α → δ
hX : Measurable X
hY : Measurable Y
hZ : Measurable Z
h : CondIndepFun (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) ⋯ X Y μ
⊢ CondIndepFun (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) ⋯ X (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) μ

rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul] at h ⊢

  rw [h2, h3, h1]
exact h.prod_mk_right hZ

have hYZ : Measurable (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) := hY.prod_mk hZ
  rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul] at h ⊢
  intro s t hs ht
  obtain ⟨u, hu, v, hv, rfl⟩ := MeasurableSet.prod ht
  simp only [Set.mk_preimage_prod]
  have h1 := h s u hs hu
  filter_upwards [h1] with a ha
  by_cases hZa : Z a ∈ v
  · simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq, hZa, and_true]
    convert ha using 2
    · ext x
      simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, hZa, and_true]
    · simp only [Set.mem_preimage, hZa, Set.indicator_of_mem, Pi.one_apply, mul_one]
  · simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq, hZa, and_false,
      Set.inter_empty, measure_empty, Set.mem_preimage, Set.indicator_of_not_mem hZa, mul_zero]

rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul] at h ⊢
  intro s t hs ht
  obtain ⟨u, hu, v, hv, rfl⟩ := MeasurableSet.prod ht
  simp only [Set.mk_preimage_prod]
  have hZv : ∀ᵐ z ∂(μ.map Z), (condDistrib Z Z μ z) (Z ⁻¹' v) = v.indicator 1 z := by
    apply ae_of_all
    intro z
    rw [condDistrib_apply_self hZ (hv.preimage hZ)]
    simp
  filter_upwards [h s u hs hu, hZv] with z hz hzv
  rw [Set.inter_comm (Y ⁻¹' u), ← Set.inter_assoc, Set.inter_comm (Z ⁻¹' v)]
  by_cases hzv' : z ∈ v
  · simp only [Set.indicator_of_mem hzv', Pi.one_apply] at hzv
    rw [condDistrib_apply_self hZ (hv.preimage hZ)] at hzv
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.indicator_of_mem hzv', Pi.one_apply] at hzv
    have : condDistrib (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) Z μ z (Y ⁻¹' u ∩ Z ⁻¹' v) =
           condDistrib (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) Z μ z (Y ⁻¹' u) := by
      apply measure_inter_eq_of_measure_eq
      · exact (hu.preimage hY).inter (hv.preimage hZ)
      · rw [condDistrib_apply_self' hZ (hv.preimage hZ) (hY.prod_mk hZ)]
        simp [hzv']
      · exact Set.inter_subset_right
    rw [this, hz, hzv, mul_one]
    congr 1
    rw [condDistrib_apply_of_fst hZ (hY.prod_mk hZ) (hu.preimage hY)]
  · simp only [Set.indicator_of_not_mem hzv', Pi.one_apply] at hzv
    rw [condDistrib_apply_self hZ (hv.preimage hZ)] at hzv
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.indicator_of_not_mem hzv'] at hzv
    have : condDistrib (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) Z μ z (Y ⁻¹' u ∩ Z ⁻¹' v) = 0 := by
      apply le_antisymm _ (zero_le _)
      calc condDistrib (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) Z μ z (Y ⁻¹' u ∩ Z ⁻¹' v) ≤
             condDistrib (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) Z μ z (Z ⁻¹' v) := by
               apply measure_mono; exact Set.inter_subset_right
           _ = _ := by rw [condDistrib_apply_self' hZ (hv.preimage hZ) (hY.prod_mk hZ)]; simp [hzv']
    rw [this, hzv, mul_zero]

rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul] at h ⊢
  intro s t hs ht
  obtain ⟨u, hu, v, hv, rfl⟩ := MeasurableSet.prod ht
  simp only [Set.mk_preimage_prod]
  have hZmeas : MeasurableSet (Z ⁻¹' v) := hZ hv
  rw [condDistrib_apply' (hY.prod_mk hZ) hZ _ (hu.prod hv), 
      condDistrib_apply' hY hZ _ hu,
      condDistrib_apply' (hY.prod_mk hZ) hZ _ (hu.prod hv)]
  · filter_upwards [h s u hs hu] with ω hω
    simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage]
    by_cases hZω : Z ω ∈ v
    · simp only [hZω, Set.mem_preimage, and_true]
      convert hω using 2
      · ext x
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, and_iff_left_iff_imp]
        intro _
        exact hZω
      · congr 1
        ext x
        simp only [Set.mem_preimage, and_iff_left_iff_imp]
        intro _
        exact hZω
    · simp only [hZω, Set.mem_preimage, and_false, Set.inter_empty, measure_empty, mul_zero]
